title: High Hopes
why_this_song: High Hopes by Panic! at the Disco (2018) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Be something greater, go make a legacy"

Had to have high, high hopes for a living
Didn't know how, but I always had a feeling
I was gonna be that one in a million

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "high" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "high" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "hopes" in the whole song?

excerpts.text: Always had high, high hopes (high, high hopes)
The weird and the novelties don't ever change

exercises.prompt_en: "High Hopes" was released in 2018. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "High Hopes" foi lançada em 2018. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "High Hopes" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "High Hopes" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
